name: Raised Rabbits with Prunes
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the rabbit pieces with salt and white pepper.
2. Dredge in flour and shake off the excess.
3. Fry in moderately heated butter until lightly browned.
4. Add flour to coat the rabbit.
5. Add prunes, beef broth, and chicken broth.
6. Cover and bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until the meat falls away from the bones.
7. Serve with wild rice.
Source: N.A.H.C. Wild Game Cookbook
Author: Unknown
